  "findings": [
    "Backstabbed device termination on a 20-ampere branch circuit."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Pigtail the conductors and terminate them using the side-wire screw terminals on a spec-grade 20A receptacle."
  ],
  "rationale": "Standard push-in (backstabbed) terminals on common receptacles are only listed and rated for 15A branch circuits and 14 AWG solid copper wire. Utilizing backstab terminals on a 20A circuit violates the listing of the device and NEC 110.14(B) / NEC 110.3(B).",
  "references": [
    "NEC 110.14",
    "NEC 110.3(B)"
  ]
}
